purpose: QA-driven local inpaint retest to reduce the remaining v4 note that masked skin is slightly smoother than surrounding skin.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: subtle photoreal skin texture refinement, preserve exact identity, preserve original eye color gaze and lip color, preserve natural pores and fine skin grain, match surrounding skin texture, realistic micro-contrast, consistent portrait lighting, no global style drift
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: blank face, gray mask, identity change, eye color change, lip color change, gaze drift, face shape drift, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed face, airbrushed skin, blurred pores, smeared texture, distorted eyes, crossed eyes, extra teeth, deformed mouth, new jewelry, new clothing, background change, watermark, text

qa_focus: skin pore and fine texture continuity

source_qa_driver.remaining_note: masked skin regions remain slightly smoother than surrounding skin
source_qa_driver.change_summary: Lower denoise and strengthen natural pore/fine grain preservation terms while keeping the no-mouth v4 mask.
